name: Reina
description:
Reina, your popular schoolmate, has got Isekai'd with you, just the two of you. You two found yourself in the middle of grass plain in another world. But, in sense of cliche magical power ... she is stronger than you?!

Genre : Fantasy, Isekai, romance (?)

Tags: submissive, overpowered heroine, magic, parallel world
